summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the credit-based platform conversion. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with credit balance in header, Credit Shop with 8 packages, and proper admin-only purchasing restrictions.
seed_data_creation: Credit balance seeded via previous purchases (Starter + Executive = 6200 credits, plus test purchases during testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit system fully implemented. 1 dollar = 5 credits. Phone number = 40 credits. Text = 0.316 credits. Credit Shop is the ONLY place USD appears. All other pages show credits. Admin can purchase, non-admin cannot. Balance is organization-wide.

credit_packages_api.GET /api/credits/packages: PASS - Returns 8 packages with correct pricing (Starter $20/100cr through Black $10K/83,333cr)
credit_packages_api.package_structure: PASS - All packages have id, name, usd, credits, discount, description

credit_balance_api.GET /api/credits/balance: PASS - Returns org credit balance (6,260 credits)

credit_purchase_api.POST /api/credits/purchase (admin): PASS - Admin can purchase packages, credits added to org
credit_purchase_api.POST /api/credits/purchase (agent): PASS - Returns 403 Forbidden for non-admin users

credit_history_api.GET /api/credits/history: PASS - Returns transaction history with user names

phone_number_credit_deduction.POST /api/phone-numbers/purchase: PASS - Deducts 40 credits from org balance
phone_number_credit_deduction.insufficient_credits: PASS - Returns 402 Payment Required when balance < 40

credit_shop_ui.page_load: PASS - Credit Shop page loads with premium dark header
credit_shop_ui.8_packages_display: PASS - All 8 packages displayed with correct pricing
credit_shop_ui.checkout_dialog: PASS - Opens with package details, amount, credits, new balance
credit_shop_ui.agent_purchase_button: PASS - Agent sees 'Admins Only' disabled button

global_header_credits.desktop_header: PASS - Shows credit balance with coin icon, links to Credit Shop
global_header_credits.mobile_header: PASS - Shows credit balance in mobile header

dashboard_widgets.buy_phone_numbers_card: PASS - Dark card with Shop Numbers button, shows active numbers, credits available, 40 credits/number
dashboard_widgets.organization_credits_card: PASS - Shows credit balance, links to Credit Shop

phone_numbers_page.monthly_cost_display: PASS - Shows '40 credits/mo' instead of USD

projections_page.credit_cost_breakdown: PASS - Shows credits per text (0.316), credits per lead contacted, total credit spend range
projections_page.campaign_credit_cost: PASS - Shows campaign credit cost instead of USD

billing_page.credits_display: PASS - Shows all amounts in credits (Amount Owed, Amount Paid, Outstanding Balance, per user pricing)

mocked_apis.Payment processing: MOCKED - Credit purchases go through instantly without Stripe
mocked_apis.Twilio SMS/Voice: MOCKED - Phone number search returns mock data (TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID and TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN not configured)
